programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget protects Fang the Wonderdog from MAD who wants to kidnap Fang and make millions in ransom

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: Hair Bear Bunch

programme.title: Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Bullwinkle

programme.title: Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Bullwinkle

programme.desc: Hydroplane Racing

programme.title: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Gabby refuses to mate his stallion with Roys horse When his horse runs away from the house he blames Roy and gets him jailed

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Lights of Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: In this musical western Marjorie Brooks Dale Evans is the owner and operator of a rodeo thats an antiquated touring company on its last legs Her business rival Frank Madden Richard Powers offers to combine their operations if the lovely Marjorie will be his bride Though she initially rebuffs his proposal a canceled booking tips the scales and forces Marjorie to accept But rodeo rider Roy Rogers Roy Rogers suspects Frank is behind Marjories troubles and sets out to investigate

programme.title: Savage Guns
programme.desc: In Sonora in a lonesome valley near the border of Arizona ex-major Summer tries to forget about the horrors of the war of independence on his farm He has foresworn to violence His intention is put to the test when a gang of villains ravages the small town

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Abilene Town

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Roy a rancher and a movie star returns to his ranch to celebrate a milestone However he soon finds that his horse Trigger has been kidnapped and is being held for ransom

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Count Gruemon steals Kevins Power Pad and Zapper in Hyrule Kevin and Link head out to the world of Puss n Boots to retrieve the stolen items

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Magic Gadget

programme.title: Grape Ape
programme.desc: Grape Ape

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: Hair Bear Bunch

programme.title: Hong 114
programme.desc: Hong 114

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Tarantulas The Deadly Cargo
programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: After Kim leaves her job to pursue her dream of writing a novel her husband David convinces her to make an erotic recording on a 976 number to bring in extra cash But Kim starts to have a mental breakdown when an obsessed caller begins murdering Meanwhile after reading Kims manuscript David wonders if Kim has herself assumed the murderous sexually deviant personality of the heroine of her novel

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A bum displays his ability to resurrect himself

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A hooker learns that beauty is only skin deep

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Loud arrogant and obnoxious criminal Trout feels a strong kinship with and develops an immediate affinity for nerdy mild-mannered and soft-spoken serial killer Wax However the close bond between these two radically contrasting lunatics falls apart after the pair pick up a brash prostitute

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Deranged Peter relentlessly stalks and terrorizes Teresa a lovely young lady who Peter thinks is his ex-wife Melissa Peter frightens Teresa out of her wits by playing a series of cruel jokes on her

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A gorgeous but deadly dancer who manipulates men easily and kills for kicks succeeds in drawing Nick into her dangerous web

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A family of militia types is being hunted by a demon

programme.title: The Forest
programme.desc: A cannibal hermit living in the woods preys on campers and hikers for his food supply

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Part 3 of Sea Maneuvers has Carter challenging the Petty Chief Officer to a boxing match not knowing the Chief was the Fleet Champ with 37 knockouts

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Mad scientist Boris Balinkoff returns to the island with a new invention that turns the castaways into human robots whom he plans to use to commit the ultimate crime

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: While the castaways prepare for a possible attack from headhunters Gilligan hits his head on a tree and begins seeing things upside down The Professor prepares a cure for him but it only makes him see double instead

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: An aging and nomadic Arapaho Indian Chief insists that he can repay the McCoys kindnesses by doing an extended sequence of dances that will bring much-needed rain

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa defies the city road commissioner when he decides to take matters into his own hands by fixing a pesky hole in the road in front of his house

programme.title: Smart 409
programme.desc: Smart 409

programme.title: Smart 425
programme.desc: Smart 425

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ is hired by a lady to transport to Washington DC a deadly virus that she stole so she can present it to Congress as proof that her company is conducting highly illegal and potentially lethal research

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan convinces Kommandant Klink that the heavy water being stored at Stalag 13 is a youth potion

programme.title: Hogans Hereos
programme.desc: Using the microphone that Klink has installed in the barracks Hogan tricks Klink into contacting an underground member

programme.title: Mchale 416
programme.desc: Mchale 416

programme.title: Mchale 336
programme.desc: Mchale 336

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadgets assignment here is to protect a star musician Rick Rocker However Rick is startled by Gadgets appearance and is trying to avoid him But Dr Claw is planning to make some kind of mind-control record he wants to use Rick rocker So Gadget must protect Rick Rocker from Dr Claw and stop Claws production of the mind-control record

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: What A Way To Go
programme.desc: A four-time widow discusses her four marriages in which all of her husbands became incredibly rich and died prematurely because of their drive to be rich

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat 109
programme.desc: Love Boat 109

programme.title: WKRP 223
programme.desc: WKRP 223

programme.title: WKRP 205
programme.desc: WKRP 205

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: A man claiming to be the Dukes cousin from England Gaylord Duke asks Uncle Jesse for a 30000 advance to pay off the taxes for a piece of land he claims to have inherited But theres more to Gaylords story that he isnt exactly telling

programme.title: Hercules 208
programme.desc: Hercules 208

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Lili is given a psychotropic drug called bliss via a Taelon device They discover it is widespread With an instantly strong addictive property the addicts are dying within 48 hours The investigation leads Liam and Sandoval to Ireland

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Blackwood Project investigates individuals who claim to have had close encounters The team stumbles onto an alien plot involving implanting something into victims bodies for the study of the human immune system setting them free and collecting them later to learn the results Harrison ends up dating one of the victims Karen McKinney

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Little Joshuas overactive imagination mistakes Arcanes hydration units for pirate treasure Are they as innocent as they sound

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: As the gods look on two figures from mythology play out an ancient story But can Alec break the curse before his friends die

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: Contact is made with the planet Piri where the main computer created an idyllic life that led to extinction of its population through apathy Now John Koenig must fight to save Alpha as his people fall under the same fate

programme.title: Children of the Corn
programme.desc: Two lovers stumble across a small American town where local children have killed the adult population in a bizarre ritual

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is sent to investigate cattle rustling but upon arrival is told it has been solved However when he hears who was caught he decides to investigate further while renewing a friendship with the lawman who trained him

programme.title: Young 314
programme.desc: Young 314

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Angered by the rising cost of health care an old man tries to pay his friends bills by threatening a businessman with the bombing of his buildings

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The teams latest mission has them trying to root out a network of spies who were brought in by an American photographer The problem is the code that he and his handlers communicate with is unbreakable So they devise a plan to get him to reveal the method of decoding his communications And their plan has him asking for Cinnamon to pose for him During their photo shoot she displays knowledge of bio chemistry which the photographer decides to exploit

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working day watch and must go to the hospital when a veteran police officer and his young partner are seriously wounded in a liquor store holdup where they deal with very different reactions of the wives

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives investigate an especially creepy college freshman suspected of the sniper-rifle deaths of two people for no apparent reason other than the sport of killing

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is arrested in a play arrest which soon turns real at an annual town celebration in which Marshal Judd tries to hide him from Lt Gerard with the aid of his fiancée Laura to collect a suspected reward for Kimbles capture

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: 25 men have died in a cave-in at the Dutton Mine in which the Barkleys have a 40 interest Heath on his way to meet Nick and investigate the disaster is badly wounded-and mistaken by the vengeful townspeople as an avenging mine payroll robber

programme.title: Music Scene
programme.desc: The official music video for Soul Circus Cowboys' newest single, Sit on a Beach Caddy Black from the Tim Jackson album Grind The video is a fun, humorous take o"

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Sir Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: Prophecy
programme.desc: A government health inspector is dispatched to assess the damage a logging company is causing to a patch of forest claimed by Native Americans and comes face to face with true terror wreaking havoc in the woods

programme.title: Wes Cravens Night Visions
programme.desc: A cop teams up with a psychic to track down a serial killer

programme.title: Howling V
programme.desc: A werewolf stalks an eclectic group of travellers on hand to attend the opening of a long-sealed European castle

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 45 opens with a pro match between always threatening Zach Manywounds and Trenton Rowell, hungry for his first win. Following is Keegan ""the Condition"" Oliver vs. Hard Knocks newcomer, Vaz Lep. The main event of the evening is welterweight matchup between two exciting Hard Knocks veterans: Joel Powell vs. Adam Smith.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Tyrone Halkett v. Travis Favel.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Clay Davidson at HK40

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Sam Franchi

programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The last Guardians escape to Earth after the fall of Gobotron while Cy-Kill and Master Renegade begin planning the attack on Earth

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Last Engineer devises a plan - and a set of Power Suits - which could defeat the Renegades

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and the Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The root which only responds to Audric or something belonging to him reacts to the Planet Xiang which leads Jayce and Herc there even though it is a planet controlled by Saw Boss They discover a message from Audric on a vase but before they can get it it is stolen Jayce and Herc and Oon are drawn further into the city where Saw Boss has laid a trap for Jayce Jayce and Oon fall into a pit which is slowly being consumed by fire; but Herc Gillian and Flora come to the rescue Safely aboard the Pride they decode the message which is revealed to be too old to be of much use

programme.title: Jayce and the Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian tells the story of Valroth a powerful weapons maker who made living armor to protect his people many years ago But the armor became too powerful and it was all destroyed except for the helmet Jayce seeks the helmet finds it and after putting it on his power is invincible He easily defeats some monster minds But the helmet is wicked and it takes over Jayces body Jayce and the power of light conquer the evil helmet and then they destroy it

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Gloria reports that Acapulcos resorts have turned into a scorching desert When MASK investigates they find VENOM working with a hotel owner who wants to make all the surrounding land worthless

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: MASK

programme.desc: Teknobot

programme.desc: Rescue! The Jupiter Crew

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Bobby is bitten by a poisonous creature and an antidote can only be found at the garden of queen Zinn Will his friends be able to find it in time and convince the queen to give them the cure

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The updated adventures of a bumbling detective

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget must find a highly experimental missile stolen by Doctor Claw and stop him from using it to destroy Metro City
